case_number: Criminal Acquittal Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Acquittal Appeal No. D – 01 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on MA No.98/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 04.02.2025 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, DPG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the appellant. No intimation is furnished. Counsel for the appellant was put on notice to satisfy the Court on the point of maintainability of instant criminal acquittal appeal vide order dated 24.09.2024. Neither appellant has appeared in person to pursue the matter nor her Counsel has addressed the Court on the point of maintainability. It appears from the conduct of the appellant and her Counsel that they have lost interest to pursue the matter vigilantly. As such instant Criminal Acquittal Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
